artifact: Ranks leagues by number of drawn matches in the 2015/2016 season.
sql: SELECT l.name FROM Match AS m JOIN League AS l ON m.league_id = l.id WHERE m.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY l.id, l.name ORDER BY SUM((m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal)::int) DESC LIMIT 1;

raw_response.sql: SELECT l.name FROM Match AS m JOIN League AS l ON m.league_id = l.id WHERE m.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY l.id, l.name ORDER BY SUM((m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal)::int) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response.artifact: Ranks leagues by number of drawn matches in the 2015/2016 season.

token_notes: Codex sub-agent token usage is visible to the Codex product, not to this local Node runner.
